pr.title: Record: Fort Knox — Legal Packed Training Cache, Zero Val Adaptation (val_bpb 0.0638, 3-seed)

output.summary: Fort Knox trains a 6L FP16 transformer and packs a frozen order-2-9 n-gram cache into the artifact, then blends neural logits with cached stats during single-pass eval.
techniques: Packed training-built order-2-9 n-gram cache stored in artifact
Temperature-sharpened logits blended with frozen cache during single-pass evaluation
6L/256d FP16 transformer trained within the 600s budget
